citations_found.summary: Legal Document View ] \ , Cited by \] Madhya Pradesh High Court Suresh Datt Sharma vs Omprakash Shivhare on 16 October, 2023 Author: Bench: ``` 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF MADHYA PRADESH AT G WA L I O R BEFORE HON'BLE SHRI JUSTICE SANJEEV S. KALGAONKAR MISCELLANEOUS CRIMINAL CASE NO. 15997 OF 2018 BETWEEN:- 1. SURESH DATT SHARMA SON OF SHRI NARESH DATT SHARMA, AGED 57 YEARS, OCCUPOATION- SERVICE CHIEF MANGAGER, PNB ZONAL OFFICE, SECTOR 17-B, CHANDIGARH, OFFICE ADDRESS- -PNB ZONAL OFFICE SECTOR 17-B C...
citations_found.ai_summary:
Here is a 2-3 sentence summary of the case:

The dispute was about a loan embezzlement case where Abhishek Shivhare, a borrower, and his father Omprakash Shivhare allegedly submitted forged documents and failed to repay the loan amount. The court, in a petition filed by Suresh Datt Sharma, a bank official who lodged the FIR against them, decided to quash the order taking cognizance against the Shivhara family for various IPC sections. The court's order was pronounced on October 16, 2023.
